steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize how popular the novel became. This means the answer needs to show the magnitude or measurable impact of its popularity.

steps.title: Match to the goal
steps.content: A answers the goal directly: the novel's popularity drove magazine sales to a record-breaking 100,000 copies per issue. B, C, and D explain the technique, cover publication details, or identify the genre—none of them quantify the popularity. That matches choice A — A is correct.
